allow: Bash(./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import src.sessao; print\('sessao OK:', [n for n in dir\(src.sessao\) if not n.startswith\('__'\)][:8]\)")

Bash(./.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import src.perfil as p; print\('perfil OK | seletor combobox:', p.COMBOBOX\); print\('status default class:', p.ResultadoProfessor\(login=\\"x\\", status=\\"erro\\"\).status\)")
